rationale: Selected because: XAG consensus at 49.4% (coin flip on primary instrument), BTC consensus at 52.7% with massive ETF outflow pressure. Both need better prediction models.

key_predictive_features: Gold-silver ratio (currently ~60.1) - mean reversion when >70 is historically bullish
COT speculative positioning - net long/short positioning leads price by 1-2 weeks
DXY (USD index) - inverse correlation, strongest cross-asset predictor
Real yields (TIPS spread) - negative real yields bullish for precious metals
Copper price - industrial demand proxy, leads silver
Solar panel demand growth - structural demand driver
fundamental_drivers: Supply deficit revised down by UBS (60-70M oz vs 300M prior) - bearish shift
Mine supply declining (major mines aging, few new projects)
Investment demand via ETFs (300M oz forecast, down from 400M)
seasonal_patterns: Month-end rebalancing effects visible at $75 round number
why_signals_failing: Regime confusion: XAG is ranging $71-88 but signals treat range as trend
Gold-silver ratio compression signal not in active set (disabled)
Metals cross-asset only 54.6% - missing key features (DXY, real yields)
williams_vix_fix crashing to 30.5% for XAG - should be removed from rescue
Too many momentum signals in ranging market - momentum fails in ranges
recommended_improvements: Add DXY rate-of-change as cross-asset feature for metals signals
Implement gold-silver ratio mean-reversion signal (high conviction when >70)
Enable intraday_seasonality for XAG (54.3% recent, improving)
Remove williams_vix_fix from per-ticker rescue for XAG
Add TIPS/real yield spread as fundamental input

key_predictive_features: ETF flow data (BlackRock IBIT, Fidelity FBTC) - strongest new institutional signal
On-chain MVRV Z-Score - 60% accuracy but only 45 samples
Exchange netflow - outflows precede price increases
Funding rate (perpetual futures) - extreme negative = bullish
Fear & Greed index - 58.6% accuracy, contrarian at extremes
Halving cycle positioning - 12-18 months post-halving historically bullish
fundamental_drivers: ETF outflows $1.55B in 6 days - bearish pressure
Halving supply squeeze: 450 BTC/day mined vs 4500-5000/day ETF demand (when positive)
401(k) crypto allocation DoL guidance - potential massive catalyst
Bitcoin dominance at 60% - capital preferring BTC over alts

cross_asset_correlations.XAU: 0.1-0.3, weak correlation, both safe havens but different drivers

seasonal_patterns: Post-halving cycle: historically peaks 12-18 months after halving (Apr 2024)
Q4 historically strongest quarter for BTC
FOMC announcement days: high vol, often reverses initial reaction
why_signals_failing: credit_spread_risk collapsed to 0% recent - actively poisoning BTC consensus
crypto_macro collapsed to 20.2% recent - another poison signal for crypto
econ_calendar permanent BUY bias at 32.7% recent - noise
On-chain only 45 samples - not enough data yet
ETF flow data not yet integrated as a signal - missing strongest institutional indicator
recommended_improvements: Integrate ETF flow data as signal (daily net flow from major ETFs)
Fix credit_spread_risk for crypto (0% recent accuracy)
Fix crypto_macro (20.2% recent) - investigate what changed
Increase on-chain sample size - consider more frequent snapshots
Add funding rate signal (currently disabled) - check recent accuracy
Add MSTR mNAV premium/discount as BTC proxy signal
